title: Software Developer
description: Joined the Incubation team. Optimized 5G network performance and reliability by developing a multi-threaded simulation framework and training a Recurrent PPO reinforcement learning agent to manage load balancing and routing. Using DRL, LSTM architectures, and Bayesian optimization, to achieve significant reductions in latency and handover failures under dynamic network conditions.

title: Software Developer
description: Migrated development environments to containerized CI/CD pipelines, engineered dynamic Jenkins security configurations, and optimized core Python scripts to reduce automation run times by 42%.

title: Automation Developer
description: Refactored Unreal Engine Blueprints into C++ to boost performance and reliability, streamlined automation workflows, and integrated cross-system tests into Jenkins CI for improved efficiency and coverage.

title: Software Developer
description: Enhanced QxConsole by implementing dynamic component rendering, unsaved changes protection, and a streamlined upgrade assistant, improving user experience, reliability, and efficiency.

title: Software Developer
description: Led the creation of an automated data extraction and analysis system, improving efficiency and reducing operational costs.

title: Bachelor of Science - BSc, Computer Science (Co-op)
description: (CGPA 9.4) Active in uOttawa CS Club, Game Dev Club, and uOttaHack. Awarded multiple scholarships and bursaries, and won 1st place in two game jams.
